We are professionals: lawyers, advisors, strategists and guides. We give straightforward advice in the best interests of our clients even when that advice is not immediately popular. We do not let a difficult conversation get in the way of a positive result.

Legal expertise applied to business

We harness our knowledge, skills and expertise across the full spectrum of business law to provide seamless, effective, top tier legal advice across all practice areas. Our partner-led teams are agile. We focus on effective communication and teamwork to deliver pragmatic, comprehensive solutions and to help our clients with their most challenging and complex business decisions.
Our specialised, and cross-disciplinary teams are extensively experienced and have a keen understanding of the relevant legal frameworks across a broad range of sectors.

Niederer Kraft Frey is a leading full-service Swiss corporate law firm based in Zurich and Geneva with an international approach. We work closely with our clients in Switzerland and internationally to implement strategic goals, strengthen businesses and navigate change effectively.

At NKF, we strive to satisfy the growing expectations of our clients, employees and the wider society by making a real and lasting difference in doing business in a responsible way. Corporate Social Responsibility is therefore an integral part of our corporate identity and culture.
We are known to provide practical, straightforward and hands-on advice. Find out more about our approach.

Our values are our constitution. They give us a solid framework in which we are free to move quickly and with integrity to serve the interests of our clients in a constantly changing commercial world.
Alternative Legal Service Provider

The Lab by NKF provides technology-based legal services and applies creativity, expertise and legal knowledge. Our services build on our distinct market knowledge, legal expertise and our capacity for innovative thought.
